genuine.ourSSOT: Select 是 opinionated form control:表單值走 `<Field>` + `useFormValidation`(react-hook-form-wrapped 的 React state)為 canonical path;桌機 combobox 只 forward `aria-required`(a11y),**不渲染原生 `<select>`/`<input>` 鏡像**,非原生控件的 focus-first-error fallback 已在 use-form-validation.ts 明文記錄為 v1 邊界。但 `name` 在型別內(`SelectProps extends React.SelectHTMLAttributes`)、mobile NativeSelect 會生效、desktop 靜默丟棄 —— 此不對稱從未被任一 spec 明文拍板。
worldClass: Radix Select:generic primitive,渲染 visually-hidden 原生 <select>(BubbleSelect)+ 提供 name/required/form props → 原生 <form> submit/validation 直接生效;甚至有 documented footgun(controlled 空值時 hidden <select> 因無 empty option 而 default 成第一項,GitHub issue #3521;#3365 討論雙 input 問題)。radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/select

Headless UI Listbox:官方逐字「If you add the `name` prop … a hidden `input` element will be rendered and kept in sync」;複雜 object 值用 bracket notation 產多個 hidden input;另有 `form` prop 以 id 綁定表單。headlessui.com/react/listbox
MUI Select(Material):設了 `name` 時渲染 hidden input 攜值送出,`getSerializedValue` 可客製序列化;NativeSelect 是另一顆(mobile 原生 UX)——與我方 desktop/mobile 雙路徑同構。mui.com/material-ui/react-select + material-ui issue #39321
Ant Design Select:opinionated framework,API 表**無** native `name` prop、不做 hidden input;值收集與 required 驗證走 Ant `Form`/`Form.Item name`(React state)。ant.design/components/select
genuine.recommendation: 選 Option B(維持 opinionated,不加原生鏡像,但修補靜默丟 name 的 footgun)。理由三層:(1)設計語言一致 —— select.spec.md 已自我定位為 opinionated form control 並援引 Rule-of-3「無真實 consumer 需求前不為可能性付成本」,我方 form SSOT 是 useFormValidation(RHF/React state),與 Ant 同派;為了追平 Radix/HeadlessUI/MUI 這種「generic primitive 必須支援任意 consumer」的行為而補原生鏡像,反而**違背**我方已拍板的 opinionated 立場,且會 import 他們的 documented footgun(Radix 空值→第一項、雙 input)。(2)M17 SSOT —— 表單值目前單一經 useFormValidation 收集,加原生 mirror = 新增第二個 value 載體 = dual source-of-truth 漂移風險。(3)真正該修的是 genuine footgun:`name` 在型別內、mobile 生效、desktop 靜默丟。B 的具體動作 = 不加 desktop 原生鏡像;在 select.spec.md 補「為何不做原生表單鏡像 + name 僅 mobile NativeSelect 原生生效、desktop 由 RHF 驅動」段;評估收窄 public 型別(不從 SelectHTMLAttributes 繼承 name/form,改用明確受控 API)避免誤導。若 user 反而希望 Select 成為能塞進裸 `<form>` 的 generic primitive(無 React state 也能 submit),才選 A。此決策動 public API 語意 = SSOT-affecting UI/UX,故照 autonomy canonical 停下請 user 拍板 B vs A vs C。
options: Option A — 補完整原生鏡像(Radix/HeadlessUI/MUI 路線):desktop CustomSelect 渲染 visually-hidden `<select name>`(或 `<input type=hidden>`)同步 value → name / 原生 required 擋 submit / 裸 <form> submit / focus-first-error 桌機手機一致。優點:對齊 generic primitive、消除不對稱、兌現型別內的 name。缺點:違背我方 documented opinionated 立場;與既有 useFormValidation 形成雙 value 載體(M17 風險);import Radix 已知 footgun(空值 default 第一項 #3521、雙 input #3365);對我方真實 consumer 冗餘。

Option B(建議)— 維持 opinionated(Ant 路線)+ 修 footgun:表單整合續走 `<Field>` + `useFormValidation`(既有 SSOT),desktop 不加原生鏡像。明確在 spec 記載 name 僅 mobile NativeSelect 原生生效、desktop 走 RHF;補「為何不做原生鏡像」段;評估收窄 public 型別移除誤導性的 name/form 繼承。優點:設計語言一致、無冗餘 DOM、守 Rule-of-3 與 M17。缺點:name 語意 desktop/mobile 不同需清楚文件化;純原生表單(無 React state)consumer 在 desktop 不支援。

Option C — 只補 desktop 原生鏡像對齊 mobile(consistency-first 最小改):僅渲染 hidden `<select name>` 讓 name 行為與 mobile 一致,但**不**採用原生 required 擋 submit(驗證仍歸 RHF)。優點:便宜消除不對稱、兌現 name。缺點:半套;仍加 DOM + Radix-style 邊界;value 走原生鏡像、rules 走 RHF 的分裂易混淆。
genuine.designLanguageFit: Option B 全面貼合既有設計語言:(1)延續 select.spec.md open-pair 段已拍板的「opinionated form control + Rule-of-3 不為可能性付受控成本」立場(同一顆元件不該對 open 軸 opinionated、對 form 軸卻改當 generic primitive);(2)mindset #2 優先消費既有 —— `<Field>` + `useFormValidation`(RHF SSOT)本就是我方消費的表單 canonical,不另造平行 value 載體;(3)M17 SSOT 可傳播 —— 表單值維持單一收集點,拒絕 hidden mirror 這種第二 source-of-truth;(4)a11y 面已對齊(desktop combobox 已 forward aria-required + aria-invalid + errormessage,mobile 走原生 select),required 的**語意**已到位,缺的只是原生**強制**驗證,而那與我方 blur/submit 驗證方法論(form-validation.spec.md 規則 1-9)刻意不同派;(5)對標世界級時選 Ant(opinionated framework)而非 Radix/HeadlessUI(generic primitive)是正確的同類對標 —— 我方是產品向 DS,不是 unstyled primitive lib。唯一需補的 footgun(靜默丟 name)正是 B 要處理的,修完即與設計語言零衝突。

autonomous.ourSSOT: 已拍板為「public 組合 slot(row-context-scoped)」— 四處機械+規範+實際用法一致:(1) code 無 @internal(對比 RowSizeProvider/ItemInlineActionButton/ItemInlineAction item-anatomy.tsx:449/605/671 都有);(2) 經 root barrel index.ts:63 front-door 匯出(= ui-development.md:33 定義的 public 機械判準);(3) item-anatomy.spec.md:543 明訂 row context 內 consumer「必須」用 ItemIcon/ItemAvatar,:201 asChild consumer 亦「必須」用;(4) app template App.tsx:40,85 直接 import + 使用 ItemAvatar。唯一雜訊 = ui-development.md:20 仍把兩者列為「Internal primitive 範例」= stale drift,與上述四點全牴觸。
worldClass: Material UI (M3) — ListItemIcon / ListItemAvatar / ListItemText 是 public composition components,consumer 直接 import 組裝 row(named-slot 模型,與我方 ItemIcon/ItemAvatar 最同構);WebFetch 實證 https://mui.com/material-ui/react-list/
GitHub Primer — ActionList.LeadingVisual / ActionList.TrailingVisual 是 public compound subcomponents,consumer 直接把 <Avatar>/<PencilIcon> 放進去;WebFetch 實證 https://primer.style/components/action-list
Radix Primitives — DropdownMenu 無專屬 Icon/Avatar slot 子元件,consumer 自由把 /icon 當 children 放進 Item(free-composition 公開模型);WebFetch 實證 https://www.radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/dropdown-menu

Polaris ResourceItem 用 public `media` prop 塞 Avatar/Thumbnail(『With media』範例);Atlassian Item 用 elemBefore/elemAfter、Ant List.Item.Meta 用 avatar prop — 三家皆 prop-based public slot(item-anatomy.spec.md:85-95 世界級對照表,Polaris media 部分 WebFetch confirm、props table 無法機械解析)
共識:六家世界級把『icon/avatar 放進 row』一律當 public consumer 操作(named-slot 子元件 / prop / free children 三種機制),無一家設為 internal 零件 — internal 化會與全體世界級牴觸
autonomous.recommendation: 維持 public 組合 slot(row-context-scoped),對齊 Material ListItemIcon / Primer LeadingVisual 的 named-slot 公開模型 — 不需 user 拍板,因為 spec:543 mandate + root barrel export + app template 實際用法 + 世界級全體已一致決定。唯一 autonomous 動作:修 ui-development.md:20 的 stale drift — 把 ItemIcon/ItemAvatar 從「Internal primitive 範例」清單移除,改歸到同段「(b) 組合 primitive(consumer 塞內容才完整)」public 類別(與 FieldControlGroup/ResizeHandle/ChromeHeader 同籃);@internal 語意保留給真內部件(RowSizeProvider/ItemInlineActionButton/ItemInlineAction)。此為對齊/表達統一(audit-vs-execute 分權 → AUTO),不動任何 canonical meaning。定性:public 但 row-context-scoped(離開 row primitive 子樹無意義,如 Material ListItemIcon 離開 List 無意義)— 非 free-standing 通用元件。
options: A(SSOT 現況,recommend):public 組合 slot(row-context-scoped)— 對齊 Material ListItemIcon / Primer LeadingVisual named-slot 公開模型;autonomous 修 ui-development.md:20 stale『internal 範例』drift,其餘四處已一致無需動

B(不建議):改判真 internal(加 @internal JSDoc + root barrel 排除)— 但直接牴觸 spec:543 consumer『必須用』mandate、app template App.tsx:85 實際 import、以及 Material/Primer 全體公開模型;會擴大 drift 而非收斂,且要回退 root barrel 匯出 = 破壞現有 consumer,不採
autonomous.designLanguageFit: 完全吻合既有設計語言:(1) 對齊 ui-development.md:18 已拍板的「組合 primitive(需 children/接線)是正常 public 用法,不是 internal」canonical — ItemIcon/ItemAvatar 與 FieldControlGroup/ResizeHandle/ChromeHeader 同類;(2) 落在 4-Family Layout Model 的 Family 1/2 slot API(item-anatomy = Family 1+2 SSOT),named-slot 是該 Family 的既定表達;(3) 符合 M23「nearest same-purpose canonical + 世界級 named-slot idiom」;(4) 讓 @internal 語意保持一致 — 只有真正內部的 size/inline-action primitive 帶標記,消除 spec/code/doc 三方矛盾,對齊 mindset #3「改一處看三處」。

worldClass: Polaris Checkbox:label 直接是 Checkbox 的 prop —— `<Checkbox label="Basic checkbox">`(WebFetch 驗證 polaris-react.shopify.com/components/selection-and-input/checkbox,另有 labelHidden 隱藏視覺仍供 AT)

Material UI (MUI):用組合 `<FormControlLabel control={<Checkbox/>} label="Label">`,但 FormControlLabel 是**公開**元件、consumer 直接用(WebFetch 驗證 mui.com/material-ui/react-checkbox)—— 對照我方:等價的 SelectionItem 是 internal 禁裸用,故我方唯一一致做法反而是 prop 形 `<Checkbox label>`

Radix Checkbox primitive:`Checkbox.Root` 無 label prop,需外掛獨立 `<label htmlFor>`(WebFetch 驗證 radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/checkbox)—— 但這是 low-level primitive 而非成品 DS,對應我方 internal 層(SelectionControl),非 consumer 展示層
Ant Design:label 作為 Checkbox 的 children —— `<Checkbox>Label</Checkbox>`(ant.design/components/checkbox,文件列 label DOM element;此頁 fetch 僅取得部分,children idiom 為 Ant 既有慣例)
autonomous.recommendation: 展示範例用公開 `<Checkbox label>`(標題議題答案)。這是 autonomous drift-fix,不需 user 拍板:把 checkbox.stories.tsx L89-106 的 `<SelectionItem control={<Checkbox/>} label htmlFor>` 收斂成 `<Checkbox label>`(等價輸出、且自動生成 id/htmlFor 免手動對號,更少出錯)。同類 drift 存在於 checkbox.anatomy.stories.tsx / radio-group.stories.tsx / switch.stories.tsx —— 依原則一併收斂為 wrapper 公開 API。**例外保留**:selection-item.stories.tsx 的裸用有明文 `@story-trait-rationale` 豁免(primitive 自家 API 展示),不動。理由三合一:(1) 我方 spec 明文禁裸用 SelectionItem;(2) 公開 label prop 已存在且 principles.stories 已示範;(3) 世界級成品 DS 多數(Polaris/Ant/Carbon/Fluent)把 label bundle 進 Checkbox 本體,MUI 的 control 組合在我方對應物是 internal 禁用。
options: A(建議)公開 `<Checkbox label>`:consumer 直用 wrapper,自動 wrap SelectionItem + 自動 wire id/htmlFor。對齊 spec 禁令 + principles.stories + Polaris/Ant 慣例。
B `<SelectionItem control={<Checkbox/>} label htmlFor>`:直接裸用 internal primitive —— 違反 selection-item.spec.md L43/L87 禁令、需手動配 id/htmlFor 易漂移;僅 primitive 自家 story 有豁免。→ 判定為 drift,不採。
autonomous.designLanguageFit: 完全落在既有設計語言內:(1) mindset #2「優先消費既有、不裸用 internal」+ ui-development.md public-vs-internal canonical(SelectionItem isInternal,只 DS 內部消費,consumer 展示層用公開 wrapper);(2) M23 nearest-same-purpose canonical wins —— Checkbox 公開 label 路徑即最近同目的 canonical;(3) 家族一致:Switch/RadioGroupItem 已用 label prop 形(principles.stories L94-95/L153-155),Checkbox 收斂後三控件展示語言統一;(4) 世界級對照:成品 DS 主流把 label bundle 進控件本體,MUI 的 FormControlLabel 組合在我方對應物是 internal → `<Checkbox label>` 是唯一同時滿足世界級 + 我方 SSOT 的選擇。

autonomous.ourSSOT: menu-item.spec.md:160 still records the 2026-07-04 Q2 flat position ("selected 勝,hover 不得洗掉;消費者 DropdownMenu highlighted 同規則" → 恆 neutral-selected). BUT that was superseded on 2026-07-05 D4 by an a11y refinement that is ALREADY shipped consistently in BOTH consumers: highlight-cursor-landing-on-selected deepens one step to neutral-selected-active (dropdown-menu.tsx:267 `data-[highlighted]:bg-neutral-selected-active` + select-menu.tsx:436 `data-[selected=true]:bg-neutral-selected-active`, comment "selected×cursor 加深一階,對齊 MUI"). So the code is NOT a rogue drift — it is the newer, coherent, DS-wide-consistent decision; the spec prose is simply stale and must be aligned to it.
worldClass: MUI Material MenuItem — state layers STACK, not replace: selected+hover = selectedOpacity+hoverOpacity, selected+focusVisible = selectedOpacity+focusOpacity → progressively DARKER (github.com mui-material/src/MenuItem/MenuItem.js, master). Uses background for selection AND deepens on both hover and keyboard focus → supports DEEPEN.

VS Code list — keyboard-focused-selected uses list.activeSelectionBackground (stronger than list.inactiveSelectionBackground) plus a distinct list.focusAndSelectionOutline; it does NOT keep focused-selected flat (code.visualstudio.com/api/references/theme-color). Second bg-based-selection system → supports DIFFERENTIATE/DEEPEN. (Our spec's original citation of VS Code for the FLAT position was a misread.)

Radix DropdownMenu / shadcn — indicate checked via ItemIndicator CHECKMARK, orthogonal to the data-highlighted bg channel, so bg-on-bg never collides (radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/dropdown-menu). Sidesteps the question via a checkmark — an escape our DS deliberately declined (no ✓, for prefix alignment).

Ant Menu — selected = itemSelectedBg, hover = itemHoverBg (distinct tokens); v4 used `:hover:not(.ant-menu-item-selected)` = selected wins on MOUSE hover in a nav-menu context (github.com ant-design/components/menu/style/index.ts). Supports FLAT only for mouse-hover, not for keyboard cursor.

Fluent UI v9 — MenuItemRadio/MenuItemCheckbox show checked via an indicator icon (selectedIndicator slot), orthogonal to the row hover/focus background, same architecture as Radix (react.fluentui.dev MenuItem docs; storybook page did not render full detail, pattern-known).
autonomous.recommendation: Align the stale spec prose (menu-item.spec.md:160) to the already-shipped deepen behavior — this is a doc-to-code catch-up, changes zero pixels, and needs no new user 拍板. Rationale: (1) World-class — MUI stacks selected+hover/focus to DARKER, VS Code strengthens active-selection; these are the ONLY two world-class systems that, like us, use BACKGROUND (not a checkmark) as the selection indicator, and both deepen. (2) A11y-required — WCAG 2.4.7: the keyboard/virtual-focus cursor must be visible; because our DS chose bg-as-selection (menu-item.spec.md:171, no ✓ for prefix alignment), when the cursor lands on the selected row a FLAT bg makes the cursor invisible (the exact regression the 2026-07-05 D4 fix addressed — cmdk data-[selected] / Radix data-[highlighted] is the cursor's ONLY visual channel). The Radix/Fluent "checkmark sidesteps it" escape is unavailable to us. (3) Already consistent — DropdownMenu (Radix) + SelectMenu (cmdk) both ship the identical deepen; the spec is the last M14 5-layer propagation gap. (4) Uses an existing token (neutral-selected-active, color.spec.md:623 "selected 上深一階"), M23 nearest-canonical, no invention. Note for the spec edit: deepen applies to ANY highlight (mouse hover AND keyboard), matching MUI which deepens on both — do NOT try to split mouse-vs-keyboard, since Radix/cmdk fire one attribute for both and it is not cleanly separable in CSS.
options: A) Keep spec flat + REVERT both consumers to flat neutral-selected. REJECT: un-ships a working a11y fix, reintroduces the WCAG 2.4.7 keyboard-cursor-invisible regression, and contradicts MUI + VS Code (the bg-based-selection cohort).

B) [RECOMMENDED] Bless the deepen (neutral-selected-active on highlight-over-selected) as canonical and update the stale menu-item.spec.md:160 prose. Already shipped consistently in DropdownMenu + SelectMenu; world-class + a11y-correct; existing token (M23).

C) Split mouse-hover-on-selected (flat, Ant idiom) vs keyboard-highlight-on-selected (deepen, a11y). REJECT: Radix data-[highlighted] and cmdk data-[selected] fire for BOTH pointer and keyboard — not cleanly separable in CSS without JS input-modality tracking; over-engineered; MUI itself deepens on both hover AND focus, so 'deepen on any highlight' is already the world-class norm.
autonomous.designLanguageFit: Consumes existing token neutral-selected-active (color.spec.md:623 "selected 上深一階 click 回饋"), M23 nearest-canonical — no new token/value invented (mindset #2). Consistent with the DS's already-established "menu focus = background change, not an outline ring" language (menu-item.spec.md A11y section, citing Material/Radix/cmdk): deepen is a bg change on the same channel, so it does not introduce a competing focus mechanism. Preserves "bg is the single selection indicator, no ✓" (menu-item.spec.md:171, prefix-alignment rationale) — deepening keeps the row visibly darker-than-default (still reads as selected) while adding one perceptible step for cursor position, so selection legibility and cursor visibility coexist on one channel. Aligns our bg-based-selection choice with the only two world-class systems that also use bg-based selection (MUI + VS Code), rather than the checkmark cohort (Radix/Fluent) whose escape hatch we deliberately declined. Closes the last M14 5-layer propagation gap: code shipped the decision 2026-07-05 D4 across both Radix + cmdk consumers; only the spec prose lagged.

autonomous.ourSSOT: Coachmark 內部已寫死 `<PopoverTrigger asChild>{children}</PopoverTrigger>`,錨點在 runtime 已經是 Radix Slot 的「單一元素」契約,與 Popover/Tooltip/HoverCard 完全同機制;CLAUDE.md 失敗記憶索引也已載明「asChild + Slot → children 必為單一 element,否則 React.Children.only runtime fail」。差別只在型別標註:Coachmark 把 anchor 標成 `React.ReactNode`(比 runtime 契約寬),而 Popover/Tooltip/HoverCard 是由 consumer 自己寫 asChild + 傳單一 element。
worldClass: Radix Popover/Slot:Trigger/Anchor 用 asChild 合併到「single children element」(Slot doc 明寫 single child),要定位到別的元素則用 Popover.Anchor asChild 指向另一個單一元素 — radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/utilities/slot + /components/popover
Shepherd.js:step 的 attachTo.element = selector 字串 | DOM element | 回傳單一元素的 function,一步一錨、恆為單一元素 — docs.shepherdjs.dev/api/step/interfaces/stepoptions
Reactour:每個 step 的 selector 是 CSS 字串,經 document.querySelector 解析成單一元素 — npmjs.com/package/@reactour/tour
Driver.js:DriveStep.element = DOM Element | selector | function,selector 時「the first matching element will be highlighted」= 單一元素 — driverjs.com/docs/configuration
Ant Design Tour:TourStep.target 型別 = `() => HTMLElement | HTMLElement`,單一 HTMLElement / 回傳單一元素 — ant.design/components/tour
Intro.js:step.element = 單一 DOM element / CSS selector(document.querySelectorAll('#x')[0]),一步錨一個元素 — introjs.com/docs/tour/api
autonomous.recommendation: 對齊即可,不需 user 拍板(autonomous)。理由:錨點的「單一元素」契約在我方 runtime 已成立(asChild → Radix Slot,和三個兄弟浮層同一條 code path),失敗記憶索引也已把它列為 canonical,且 6 家世界級(Radix / Shepherd / Reactour / Driver.js / Ant Tour / Intro.js)100% 都只錨單一元素 — 「錨點可以是多元素 / fragment / 任意 ReactNode」根本不是一個合法選項(runtime 會直接炸)。所以在「錨點要不要收成單一元素契約」這個實質設計問題上,答案早已是 YES 且已生效,沒有真正的多選項取捨。唯一可做的是純 DX/型別修正:Coachmark 把 asChild 藏在內部(consumer 不像用 Popover 時自己寫 asChild,不會意識到必須傳單一可掛 ref 的 element),所以建議把 `children: React.ReactNode` 收緊成 `children: React.ReactElement`,讓「單一元素」要求在 compile 期就顯現、而非等 runtime 才 React.Children.only crash。這是型別對齊 runtime 事實,非視覺/UX 改動,屬 autonomous refactor。不要新增 `asChild` prop(見 options 3)。落地時同步在 coachmark.spec.md「Props 結構」補一句「children = 單一 anchor element(asChild Slot,對齊 Popover/Tooltip/HoverCard)」。
options: (推薦)保留內部 asChild,型別由 `React.ReactNode` 收緊為 `React.ReactElement` — 讓已存在的單一元素契約在 compile 期顯現,對齊 runtime Slot 事實 + 6 家世界級全為單一錨點;consumer 用法 `<Coachmark><Button/></Coachmark>` 完全不變
維持現狀(ReactNode)— 與 Radix Trigger 原生 children 型別一致,靠 runtime Slot 保證;缺點:consumer 傳字串/多元素/fragment 時是 runtime crash 而非 compile error,而 Coachmark 又把 asChild 藏起來,錯得更隱蔽
(否決)像 raw Radix Trigger 一樣對外開 `asChild` prop — 過度工程:Coachmark 是 composition wrapper 不是 low-level trigger,asChild=false 會多包一層 span 破壞定位語義;且 6 家 tour/coachmark 沒有一家讓你「關掉」單一錨點契約
autonomous.designLanguageFit: 完全落在既有一致設計語言內,不新增任何 pattern:(1) 浮層家族一致 — Popover/Tooltip/HoverCard 皆用 asChild Slot 單一元素定位,Coachmark 收緊型別後三者在「錨點契約」上表達一致(runtime 本已一致,型別也對齊);(2) 呼應失敗記憶索引既有 canonical「asChild children = 單一 element」,把隱性 runtime 契約提升為顯性 compile 契約,屬 self-verify 精神;(3) 對標世界級 mindset #1 — Radix/Shepherd/Reactour/Driver.js/Ant/Intro 六家 100% 單一錨點,收緊型別即是對齊而非發明;(4) 零視覺/UX 變動、consumer 既有用法不破 — 純型別正確性修正,符合「autonomous refactor 不動 SSOT-UI/UX」分權。

all.ourSSOT: Select 是 opinionated form control:表單值走 `<Field>` + `useFormValidation`(react-hook-form-wrapped 的 React state)為 canonical path;桌機 combobox 只 forward `aria-required`(a11y),**不渲染原生 `<select>`/`<input>` 鏡像**,非原生控件的 focus-first-error fallback 已在 use-form-validation.ts 明文記錄為 v1 邊界。但 `name` 在型別內(`SelectProps extends React.SelectHTMLAttributes`)、mobile NativeSelect 會生效、desktop 靜默丟棄 —— 此不對稱從未被任一 spec 明文拍板。
worldClass: Radix Select:generic primitive,渲染 visually-hidden 原生 <select>(BubbleSelect)+ 提供 name/required/form props → 原生 <form> submit/validation 直接生效;甚至有 documented footgun(controlled 空值時 hidden <select> 因無 empty option 而 default 成第一項,GitHub issue #3521;#3365 討論雙 input 問題)。radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/select

Headless UI Listbox:官方逐字「If you add the `name` prop … a hidden `input` element will be rendered and kept in sync」;複雜 object 值用 bracket notation 產多個 hidden input;另有 `form` prop 以 id 綁定表單。headlessui.com/react/listbox
MUI Select(Material):設了 `name` 時渲染 hidden input 攜值送出,`getSerializedValue` 可客製序列化;NativeSelect 是另一顆(mobile 原生 UX)——與我方 desktop/mobile 雙路徑同構。mui.com/material-ui/react-select + material-ui issue #39321
Ant Design Select:opinionated framework,API 表**無** native `name` prop、不做 hidden input;值收集與 required 驗證走 Ant `Form`/`Form.Item name`(React state)。ant.design/components/select
all.recommendation: 選 Option B(維持 opinionated,不加原生鏡像,但修補靜默丟 name 的 footgun)。理由三層:(1)設計語言一致 —— select.spec.md 已自我定位為 opinionated form control 並援引 Rule-of-3「無真實 consumer 需求前不為可能性付成本」,我方 form SSOT 是 useFormValidation(RHF/React state),與 Ant 同派;為了追平 Radix/HeadlessUI/MUI 這種「generic primitive 必須支援任意 consumer」的行為而補原生鏡像,反而**違背**我方已拍板的 opinionated 立場,且會 import 他們的 documented footgun(Radix 空值→第一項、雙 input)。(2)M17 SSOT —— 表單值目前單一經 useFormValidation 收集,加原生 mirror = 新增第二個 value 載體 = dual source-of-truth 漂移風險。(3)真正該修的是 genuine footgun:`name` 在型別內、mobile 生效、desktop 靜默丟。B 的具體動作 = 不加 desktop 原生鏡像;在 select.spec.md 補「為何不做原生表單鏡像 + name 僅 mobile NativeSelect 原生生效、desktop 由 RHF 驅動」段;評估收窄 public 型別(不從 SelectHTMLAttributes 繼承 name/form,改用明確受控 API)避免誤導。若 user 反而希望 Select 成為能塞進裸 `<form>` 的 generic primitive(無 React state 也能 submit),才選 A。此決策動 public API 語意 = SSOT-affecting UI/UX,故照 autonomy canonical 停下請 user 拍板 B vs A vs C。
options: Option A — 補完整原生鏡像(Radix/HeadlessUI/MUI 路線):desktop CustomSelect 渲染 visually-hidden `<select name>`(或 `<input type=hidden>`)同步 value → name / 原生 required 擋 submit / 裸 <form> submit / focus-first-error 桌機手機一致。優點:對齊 generic primitive、消除不對稱、兌現型別內的 name。缺點:違背我方 documented opinionated 立場;與既有 useFormValidation 形成雙 value 載體(M17 風險);import Radix 已知 footgun(空值 default 第一項 #3521、雙 input #3365);對我方真實 consumer 冗餘。

Option B(建議)— 維持 opinionated(Ant 路線)+ 修 footgun:表單整合續走 `<Field>` + `useFormValidation`(既有 SSOT),desktop 不加原生鏡像。明確在 spec 記載 name 僅 mobile NativeSelect 原生生效、desktop 走 RHF;補「為何不做原生鏡像」段;評估收窄 public 型別移除誤導性的 name/form 繼承。優點:設計語言一致、無冗餘 DOM、守 Rule-of-3 與 M17。缺點:name 語意 desktop/mobile 不同需清楚文件化;純原生表單(無 React state)consumer 在 desktop 不支援。

Option C — 只補 desktop 原生鏡像對齊 mobile(consistency-first 最小改):僅渲染 hidden `<select name>` 讓 name 行為與 mobile 一致,但**不**採用原生 required 擋 submit(驗證仍歸 RHF)。優點:便宜消除不對稱、兌現 name。缺點:半套;仍加 DOM + Radix-style 邊界;value 走原生鏡像、rules 走 RHF 的分裂易混淆。
all.designLanguageFit: Option B 全面貼合既有設計語言:(1)延續 select.spec.md open-pair 段已拍板的「opinionated form control + Rule-of-3 不為可能性付受控成本」立場(同一顆元件不該對 open 軸 opinionated、對 form 軸卻改當 generic primitive);(2)mindset #2 優先消費既有 —— `<Field>` + `useFormValidation`(RHF SSOT)本就是我方消費的表單 canonical,不另造平行 value 載體;(3)M17 SSOT 可傳播 —— 表單值維持單一收集點,拒絕 hidden mirror 這種第二 source-of-truth;(4)a11y 面已對齊(desktop combobox 已 forward aria-required + aria-invalid + errormessage,mobile 走原生 select),required 的**語意**已到位,缺的只是原生**強制**驗證,而那與我方 blur/submit 驗證方法論(form-validation.spec.md 規則 1-9)刻意不同派;(5)對標世界級時選 Ant(opinionated framework)而非 Radix/HeadlessUI(generic primitive)是正確的同類對標 —— 我方是產品向 DS,不是 unstyled primitive lib。唯一需補的 footgun(靜默丟 name)正是 B 要處理的,修完即與設計語言零衝突。

all.ourSSOT: 已拍板為「public 組合 slot(row-context-scoped)」— 四處機械+規範+實際用法一致:(1) code 無 @internal(對比 RowSizeProvider/ItemInlineActionButton/ItemInlineAction item-anatomy.tsx:449/605/671 都有);(2) 經 root barrel index.ts:63 front-door 匯出(= ui-development.md:33 定義的 public 機械判準);(3) item-anatomy.spec.md:543 明訂 row context 內 consumer「必須」用 ItemIcon/ItemAvatar,:201 asChild consumer 亦「必須」用;(4) app template App.tsx:40,85 直接 import + 使用 ItemAvatar。唯一雜訊 = ui-development.md:20 仍把兩者列為「Internal primitive 範例」= stale drift,與上述四點全牴觸。
worldClass: Material UI (M3) — ListItemIcon / ListItemAvatar / ListItemText 是 public composition components,consumer 直接 import 組裝 row(named-slot 模型,與我方 ItemIcon/ItemAvatar 最同構);WebFetch 實證 https://mui.com/material-ui/react-list/
GitHub Primer — ActionList.LeadingVisual / ActionList.TrailingVisual 是 public compound subcomponents,consumer 直接把 <Avatar>/<PencilIcon> 放進去;WebFetch 實證 https://primer.style/components/action-list
Radix Primitives — DropdownMenu 無專屬 Icon/Avatar slot 子元件,consumer 自由把 /icon 當 children 放進 Item(free-composition 公開模型);WebFetch 實證 https://www.radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/dropdown-menu

Polaris ResourceItem 用 public `media` prop 塞 Avatar/Thumbnail(『With media』範例);Atlassian Item 用 elemBefore/elemAfter、Ant List.Item.Meta 用 avatar prop — 三家皆 prop-based public slot(item-anatomy.spec.md:85-95 世界級對照表,Polaris media 部分 WebFetch confirm、props table 無法機械解析)
共識:六家世界級把『icon/avatar 放進 row』一律當 public consumer 操作(named-slot 子元件 / prop / free children 三種機制),無一家設為 internal 零件 — internal 化會與全體世界級牴觸
all.recommendation: 維持 public 組合 slot(row-context-scoped),對齊 Material ListItemIcon / Primer LeadingVisual 的 named-slot 公開模型 — 不需 user 拍板,因為 spec:543 mandate + root barrel export + app template 實際用法 + 世界級全體已一致決定。唯一 autonomous 動作:修 ui-development.md:20 的 stale drift — 把 ItemIcon/ItemAvatar 從「Internal primitive 範例」清單移除,改歸到同段「(b) 組合 primitive(consumer 塞內容才完整)」public 類別(與 FieldControlGroup/ResizeHandle/ChromeHeader 同籃);@internal 語意保留給真內部件(RowSizeProvider/ItemInlineActionButton/ItemInlineAction)。此為對齊/表達統一(audit-vs-execute 分權 → AUTO),不動任何 canonical meaning。定性:public 但 row-context-scoped(離開 row primitive 子樹無意義,如 Material ListItemIcon 離開 List 無意義)— 非 free-standing 通用元件。
options: A(SSOT 現況,recommend):public 組合 slot(row-context-scoped)— 對齊 Material ListItemIcon / Primer LeadingVisual named-slot 公開模型;autonomous 修 ui-development.md:20 stale『internal 範例』drift,其餘四處已一致無需動

B(不建議):改判真 internal(加 @internal JSDoc + root barrel 排除)— 但直接牴觸 spec:543 consumer『必須用』mandate、app template App.tsx:85 實際 import、以及 Material/Primer 全體公開模型;會擴大 drift 而非收斂,且要回退 root barrel 匯出 = 破壞現有 consumer,不採
all.designLanguageFit: 完全吻合既有設計語言:(1) 對齊 ui-development.md:18 已拍板的「組合 primitive(需 children/接線)是正常 public 用法,不是 internal」canonical — ItemIcon/ItemAvatar 與 FieldControlGroup/ResizeHandle/ChromeHeader 同類;(2) 落在 4-Family Layout Model 的 Family 1/2 slot API(item-anatomy = Family 1+2 SSOT),named-slot 是該 Family 的既定表達;(3) 符合 M23「nearest same-purpose canonical + 世界級 named-slot idiom」;(4) 讓 @internal 語意保持一致 — 只有真正內部的 size/inline-action primitive 帶標記,消除 spec/code/doc 三方矛盾,對齊 mindset #3「改一處看三處」。

worldClass: Polaris Checkbox:label 直接是 Checkbox 的 prop —— `<Checkbox label="Basic checkbox">`(WebFetch 驗證 polaris-react.shopify.com/components/selection-and-input/checkbox,另有 labelHidden 隱藏視覺仍供 AT)

Material UI (MUI):用組合 `<FormControlLabel control={<Checkbox/>} label="Label">`,但 FormControlLabel 是**公開**元件、consumer 直接用(WebFetch 驗證 mui.com/material-ui/react-checkbox)—— 對照我方:等價的 SelectionItem 是 internal 禁裸用,故我方唯一一致做法反而是 prop 形 `<Checkbox label>`

Radix Checkbox primitive:`Checkbox.Root` 無 label prop,需外掛獨立 `<label htmlFor>`(WebFetch 驗證 radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/checkbox)—— 但這是 low-level primitive 而非成品 DS,對應我方 internal 層(SelectionControl),非 consumer 展示層
Ant Design:label 作為 Checkbox 的 children —— `<Checkbox>Label</Checkbox>`(ant.design/components/checkbox,文件列 label DOM element;此頁 fetch 僅取得部分,children idiom 為 Ant 既有慣例)
all.recommendation: 展示範例用公開 `<Checkbox label>`(標題議題答案)。這是 autonomous drift-fix,不需 user 拍板:把 checkbox.stories.tsx L89-106 的 `<SelectionItem control={<Checkbox/>} label htmlFor>` 收斂成 `<Checkbox label>`(等價輸出、且自動生成 id/htmlFor 免手動對號,更少出錯)。同類 drift 存在於 checkbox.anatomy.stories.tsx / radio-group.stories.tsx / switch.stories.tsx —— 依原則一併收斂為 wrapper 公開 API。**例外保留**:selection-item.stories.tsx 的裸用有明文 `@story-trait-rationale` 豁免(primitive 自家 API 展示),不動。理由三合一:(1) 我方 spec 明文禁裸用 SelectionItem;(2) 公開 label prop 已存在且 principles.stories 已示範;(3) 世界級成品 DS 多數(Polaris/Ant/Carbon/Fluent)把 label bundle 進 Checkbox 本體,MUI 的 control 組合在我方對應物是 internal 禁用。

B `<SelectionItem control={<Checkbox/>} label htmlFor>`:直接裸用 internal primitive —— 違反 selection-item.spec.md L43/L87 禁令、需手動配 id/htmlFor 易漂移;僅 primitive 自家 story 有豁免。→ 判定為 drift,不採。
all.designLanguageFit: 完全落在既有設計語言內:(1) mindset #2「優先消費既有、不裸用 internal」+ ui-development.md public-vs-internal canonical(SelectionItem isInternal,只 DS 內部消費,consumer 展示層用公開 wrapper);(2) M23 nearest-same-purpose canonical wins —— Checkbox 公開 label 路徑即最近同目的 canonical;(3) 家族一致:Switch/RadioGroupItem 已用 label prop 形(principles.stories L94-95/L153-155),Checkbox 收斂後三控件展示語言統一;(4) 世界級對照:成品 DS 主流把 label bundle 進控件本體,MUI 的 FormControlLabel 組合在我方對應物是 internal → `<Checkbox label>` 是唯一同時滿足世界級 + 我方 SSOT 的選擇。

all.ourSSOT: menu-item.spec.md:160 still records the 2026-07-04 Q2 flat position ("selected 勝,hover 不得洗掉;消費者 DropdownMenu highlighted 同規則" → 恆 neutral-selected). BUT that was superseded on 2026-07-05 D4 by an a11y refinement that is ALREADY shipped consistently in BOTH consumers: highlight-cursor-landing-on-selected deepens one step to neutral-selected-active (dropdown-menu.tsx:267 `data-[highlighted]:bg-neutral-selected-active` + select-menu.tsx:436 `data-[selected=true]:bg-neutral-selected-active`, comment "selected×cursor 加深一階,對齊 MUI"). So the code is NOT a rogue drift — it is the newer, coherent, DS-wide-consistent decision; the spec prose is simply stale and must be aligned to it.
worldClass: MUI Material MenuItem — state layers STACK, not replace: selected+hover = selectedOpacity+hoverOpacity, selected+focusVisible = selectedOpacity+focusOpacity → progressively DARKER (github.com mui-material/src/MenuItem/MenuItem.js, master). Uses background for selection AND deepens on both hover and keyboard focus → supports DEEPEN.

VS Code list — keyboard-focused-selected uses list.activeSelectionBackground (stronger than list.inactiveSelectionBackground) plus a distinct list.focusAndSelectionOutline; it does NOT keep focused-selected flat (code.visualstudio.com/api/references/theme-color). Second bg-based-selection system → supports DIFFERENTIATE/DEEPEN. (Our spec's original citation of VS Code for the FLAT position was a misread.)

Radix DropdownMenu / shadcn — indicate checked via ItemIndicator CHECKMARK, orthogonal to the data-highlighted bg channel, so bg-on-bg never collides (radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/dropdown-menu). Sidesteps the question via a checkmark — an escape our DS deliberately declined (no ✓, for prefix alignment).

Ant Menu — selected = itemSelectedBg, hover = itemHoverBg (distinct tokens); v4 used `:hover:not(.ant-menu-item-selected)` = selected wins on MOUSE hover in a nav-menu context (github.com ant-design/components/menu/style/index.ts). Supports FLAT only for mouse-hover, not for keyboard cursor.

Fluent UI v9 — MenuItemRadio/MenuItemCheckbox show checked via an indicator icon (selectedIndicator slot), orthogonal to the row hover/focus background, same architecture as Radix (react.fluentui.dev MenuItem docs; storybook page did not render full detail, pattern-known).
all.recommendation: Align the stale spec prose (menu-item.spec.md:160) to the already-shipped deepen behavior — this is a doc-to-code catch-up, changes zero pixels, and needs no new user 拍板. Rationale: (1) World-class — MUI stacks selected+hover/focus to DARKER, VS Code strengthens active-selection; these are the ONLY two world-class systems that, like us, use BACKGROUND (not a checkmark) as the selection indicator, and both deepen. (2) A11y-required — WCAG 2.4.7: the keyboard/virtual-focus cursor must be visible; because our DS chose bg-as-selection (menu-item.spec.md:171, no ✓ for prefix alignment), when the cursor lands on the selected row a FLAT bg makes the cursor invisible (the exact regression the 2026-07-05 D4 fix addressed — cmdk data-[selected] / Radix data-[highlighted] is the cursor's ONLY visual channel). The Radix/Fluent "checkmark sidesteps it" escape is unavailable to us. (3) Already consistent — DropdownMenu (Radix) + SelectMenu (cmdk) both ship the identical deepen; the spec is the last M14 5-layer propagation gap. (4) Uses an existing token (neutral-selected-active, color.spec.md:623 "selected 上深一階"), M23 nearest-canonical, no invention. Note for the spec edit: deepen applies to ANY highlight (mouse hover AND keyboard), matching MUI which deepens on both — do NOT try to split mouse-vs-keyboard, since Radix/cmdk fire one attribute for both and it is not cleanly separable in CSS.
options: A) Keep spec flat + REVERT both consumers to flat neutral-selected. REJECT: un-ships a working a11y fix, reintroduces the WCAG 2.4.7 keyboard-cursor-invisible regression, and contradicts MUI + VS Code (the bg-based-selection cohort).

B) [RECOMMENDED] Bless the deepen (neutral-selected-active on highlight-over-selected) as canonical and update the stale menu-item.spec.md:160 prose. Already shipped consistently in DropdownMenu + SelectMenu; world-class + a11y-correct; existing token (M23).

C) Split mouse-hover-on-selected (flat, Ant idiom) vs keyboard-highlight-on-selected (deepen, a11y). REJECT: Radix data-[highlighted] and cmdk data-[selected] fire for BOTH pointer and keyboard — not cleanly separable in CSS without JS input-modality tracking; over-engineered; MUI itself deepens on both hover AND focus, so 'deepen on any highlight' is already the world-class norm.
all.designLanguageFit: Consumes existing token neutral-selected-active (color.spec.md:623 "selected 上深一階 click 回饋"), M23 nearest-canonical — no new token/value invented (mindset #2). Consistent with the DS's already-established "menu focus = background change, not an outline ring" language (menu-item.spec.md A11y section, citing Material/Radix/cmdk): deepen is a bg change on the same channel, so it does not introduce a competing focus mechanism. Preserves "bg is the single selection indicator, no ✓" (menu-item.spec.md:171, prefix-alignment rationale) — deepening keeps the row visibly darker-than-default (still reads as selected) while adding one perceptible step for cursor position, so selection legibility and cursor visibility coexist on one channel. Aligns our bg-based-selection choice with the only two world-class systems that also use bg-based selection (MUI + VS Code), rather than the checkmark cohort (Radix/Fluent) whose escape hatch we deliberately declined. Closes the last M14 5-layer propagation gap: code shipped the decision 2026-07-05 D4 across both Radix + cmdk consumers; only the spec prose lagged.

all.ourSSOT: Coachmark 內部已寫死 `<PopoverTrigger asChild>{children}</PopoverTrigger>`,錨點在 runtime 已經是 Radix Slot 的「單一元素」契約,與 Popover/Tooltip/HoverCard 完全同機制;CLAUDE.md 失敗記憶索引也已載明「asChild + Slot → children 必為單一 element,否則 React.Children.only runtime fail」。差別只在型別標註:Coachmark 把 anchor 標成 `React.ReactNode`(比 runtime 契約寬),而 Popover/Tooltip/HoverCard 是由 consumer 自己寫 asChild + 傳單一 element。
worldClass: Radix Popover/Slot:Trigger/Anchor 用 asChild 合併到「single children element」(Slot doc 明寫 single child),要定位到別的元素則用 Popover.Anchor asChild 指向另一個單一元素 — radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/utilities/slot + /components/popover
Shepherd.js:step 的 attachTo.element = selector 字串 | DOM element | 回傳單一元素的 function,一步一錨、恆為單一元素 — docs.shepherdjs.dev/api/step/interfaces/stepoptions
Reactour:每個 step 的 selector 是 CSS 字串,經 document.querySelector 解析成單一元素 — npmjs.com/package/@reactour/tour
Driver.js:DriveStep.element = DOM Element | selector | function,selector 時「the first matching element will be highlighted」= 單一元素 — driverjs.com/docs/configuration
Ant Design Tour:TourStep.target 型別 = `() => HTMLElement | HTMLElement`,單一 HTMLElement / 回傳單一元素 — ant.design/components/tour
Intro.js:step.element = 單一 DOM element / CSS selector(document.querySelectorAll('#x')[0]),一步錨一個元素 — introjs.com/docs/tour/api
all.recommendation: 對齊即可,不需 user 拍板(autonomous)。理由:錨點的「單一元素」契約在我方 runtime 已成立(asChild → Radix Slot,和三個兄弟浮層同一條 code path),失敗記憶索引也已把它列為 canonical,且 6 家世界級(Radix / Shepherd / Reactour / Driver.js / Ant Tour / Intro.js)100% 都只錨單一元素 — 「錨點可以是多元素 / fragment / 任意 ReactNode」根本不是一個合法選項(runtime 會直接炸)。所以在「錨點要不要收成單一元素契約」這個實質設計問題上,答案早已是 YES 且已生效,沒有真正的多選項取捨。唯一可做的是純 DX/型別修正:Coachmark 把 asChild 藏在內部(consumer 不像用 Popover 時自己寫 asChild,不會意識到必須傳單一可掛 ref 的 element),所以建議把 `children: React.ReactNode` 收緊成 `children: React.ReactElement`,讓「單一元素」要求在 compile 期就顯現、而非等 runtime 才 React.Children.only crash。這是型別對齊 runtime 事實,非視覺/UX 改動,屬 autonomous refactor。不要新增 `asChild` prop(見 options 3)。落地時同步在 coachmark.spec.md「Props 結構」補一句「children = 單一 anchor element(asChild Slot,對齊 Popover/Tooltip/HoverCard)」。
options: (推薦)保留內部 asChild,型別由 `React.ReactNode` 收緊為 `React.ReactElement` — 讓已存在的單一元素契約在 compile 期顯現,對齊 runtime Slot 事實 + 6 家世界級全為單一錨點;consumer 用法 `<Coachmark><Button/></Coachmark>` 完全不變
維持現狀(ReactNode)— 與 Radix Trigger 原生 children 型別一致,靠 runtime Slot 保證;缺點:consumer 傳字串/多元素/fragment 時是 runtime crash 而非 compile error,而 Coachmark 又把 asChild 藏起來,錯得更隱蔽
(否決)像 raw Radix Trigger 一樣對外開 `asChild` prop — 過度工程:Coachmark 是 composition wrapper 不是 low-level trigger,asChild=false 會多包一層 span 破壞定位語義;且 6 家 tour/coachmark 沒有一家讓你「關掉」單一錨點契約
all.designLanguageFit: 完全落在既有一致設計語言內,不新增任何 pattern:(1) 浮層家族一致 — Popover/Tooltip/HoverCard 皆用 asChild Slot 單一元素定位,Coachmark 收緊型別後三者在「錨點契約」上表達一致(runtime 本已一致,型別也對齊);(2) 呼應失敗記憶索引既有 canonical「asChild children = 單一 element」,把隱性 runtime 契約提升為顯性 compile 契約,屬 self-verify 精神;(3) 對標世界級 mindset #1 — Radix/Shepherd/Reactour/Driver.js/Ant/Intro 六家 100% 單一錨點,收緊型別即是對齊而非發明;(4) 零視覺/UX 變動、consumer 既有用法不破 — 純型別正確性修正,符合「autonomous refactor 不動 SSOT-UI/UX」分權。
